fails.why: No cva() anywhere; button.tsx uses plain object maps + lookup, card.tsx uses a manual variant ternary
Off-scale values introduced: py-1.5, mt-1, mt-3, space-y-3 not on the 4-increment scale
Dropdown <li> click handlers (interactive) have no focus styles and are not keyboard-focusable
MenuButton is p-2 around w-5 h-5 svg (~36px); no 44px min touch target enforced anywhere
dialog.tsx Dialog.Content still uses transition-all instead of transform/opacity-only
card.tsx still uses React.forwardRef + displayName; React 19 wants ref as a regular prop
dialog.tsx Dialog.Content keeps fixed w-[480px] with no responsive override
@theme defines custom colors but never emits --color-*: initial to clear defaults first
animate-pulse used in skeleton but @theme has no --animate-* tokens and no @keyframes
ContainerCard has no @container on parent and no @lg:/@2xl: variants on children
Native popover has no @starting-style entry animation
